description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow surrounded by a dense hedge, featuring a flat roof and expansive glass windows along the main facade. The front of the house opens to a large covered patio with floor-to-ceiling windows and sliding doors, providing seamless indoor-outdoor living. The backyard includes a spacious tiled terrace, a rectangular swimming pool, and a sunbathing area with lounge chairs. The landscaping is minimalist, with manicured hedges enclosing the property and a few strategically placed potted trees and shrubs. The exterior walls are primarily white with some wooden and stone accents, contributing to a sleek, contemporary aesthetic. The overall design emphasizes open space, natural light, and a strong connection to the outdoors.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, a covered patio, and a backyard pool, all enclosed by manicured hedges. The design is sleek and open, with minimalist landscaping and contemporary finishes.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass windows, covered patio, and part of the landscaped yard.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the backyard with a rectangular swimming pool, sunbathing area, and tiled terrace.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with grouped windows, patio, and the pool area, as well as the hedge enclosure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the pool, sun loungers, and a small garden area with potted trees.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped front and side windows
